Zhong Shen йЌѕзґі
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhong Shen (йЌѕзґі). Had half his head cut off by Zhao Yun as Shen pursued the Shu general. Zhong Shen is a fictional character. Zhong Shen was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Zhong Shen lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
